intro.name: Ricardo Júnior
intro.description: I develop web applications focused on clean architecture, performance, and user experience. I turn ideas into products.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a 19-year-old software developer based in Santos (SP), with 4 years of programming practice and 1 year and 3 months of professional experience. Passionate about solving problems and learning new technologies, I seek opportunities to keep growing in the tech field, focusing on best practices such as DDD, TDD, and clean architecture.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Management System
restaurant.description: A restaurant management system developed as a final course project (TCC), featuring inventory control, orders, employee management, and business analytics.
restaurant.details: The project was built using C# ASP.NET, Ionic Angular, JavaScript, TypeScript, MySQL Workbench, as well as HTML5 and CSS for interface structure, and Figma for UI/UX design and logo creation.

kingOfMath.title: King of Math | Logic & Puzzles
kingOfMath.description: King of Math is an Android mobile game that challenges players to recognize patterns, solve riddles, and tackle mathematical puzzles of varying difficulty levels. Available on the Google Play Store, the game is designed for all ages to practice logic and develop reasoning in a fun and engaging way.
kingOfMath.details: My main purpose has always been to stimulate logical reasoning and problem-solving. The project started in high school with friends, evolving from a simple idea into something with great potential, using technologies and APIs to enhance the game.

loanManager.title: Loaned Items Manager
loanManager.description: The app allows users to register items that can be loaned, manage contacts, and track borrowed or available items.
loanManager.details:
This project started as a simpler study project but evolved as I learned new concepts of architecture and design patterns.
The main goal of the project is to practice object-oriented development and design patterns in Java.

freelancer.description: In this role, I analyzed and developed a RESTful API for a legal product using Python and FastAPI, structured with layered architecture and event-driven design. The system was containerized with Docker to ensure reproducible environments and consistency across development, testing, and deployment. I designed Event-Driven Architecture (EDA) flows using Redis for messaging and implemented the Outbox pattern to ensure reliable event delivery. For critical domain parts, I defined retry and dead-letter strategies. I automated the delivery pipeline using GitHub Actions CI, including unit and integration tests (also covering asynchronous flows with Pytest). I maintained a strong focus on quality, test coverage, and technical documentation, actively collaborating with the client.

daoster.description: I developed a full-stack web application using PHP, integrating the Smarty template engine and working heavily on the front-end (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). I analyzed existing systems, mapped backend/frontend flows, and designed/implemented the full backend focusing on maintainability, best practices, and real-world problem solving. I performed MySQL database modeling and optimization, deployment, and server administration via cPanel, along with API integrations. I also worked directly with clients, gathering requirements and defining features, delivering both corrective and evolutionary maintenance in an agile environment.

teaching.description: I led a study group and worked as a mathematics tutor for high school students. I planned weekly learning paths, created exercises and mock exams, corrected assignments, and provided one-on-one support. I facilitated live sessions, tracked student progress using simple performance metrics, and adapted teaching methods based on feedback, promoting engagement, autonomy, and better exam preparation.

designPattern.title: Design Pattern
designPattern.learned: Second course of the Software Design & Architecture specialization, focused on Design Patterns, SOLID principles, and Code Smells, emphasizing how to structure object-oriented systems in a modular and maintainable way.

ood.title: Object-Oriented Design
ood.learned: Course focused on object-oriented design, UML modeling, and analysis techniques such as User Stories and CRC Cards, emphasizing the importance of understanding business rules before implementation.

highschool.title: High School with Technical Certification in Systems Development
highschool.learned: During 3 years in the Technical High School program for Systems Development, I deepened my programming logic and built projects using C#, ASP.NET, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, as well as WinForms, UML, networking, security, and cryptography.

college.title: Systems Analysis and Development (Evening Program)
college.learned: Currently attending the 3rd cycle of the Systems Analysis and Development degree, furthering knowledge in software engineering, system architecture, and application development.
